description: SwissAgent self-development roadmap. The AI reads this, picks the next task, implements it, and marks it done — building itself out autonomously.

milestones.title: Phase 1 — Foundation
milestones.description: Core agent engine, CLI, REST API, 35 capability modules

tasks.title: Core agent loop (plan→tool_call→execute→reflect)
tasks.description: Agentic loop with up to 20 iterations

tasks.title: Click-based CLI
tasks.description: swissagent run/serve/list-tools/list-modules commands

tasks.title: FastAPI REST server
tasks.description: POST /run, GET /tools, POST /tools/call, GET /health

tasks.title: Module auto-discovery system
tasks.description: ModuleLoader scans modules/ and registers all tools.json

tasks.title: Plugin system
tasks.description: PluginLoader auto-discovers drop-in plugins from plugins/

tasks.title: Permission system
tasks.description: Fine-grained allow/block per tool and file path

tasks.title: 35 capability modules (175+ tools)
tasks.description: filesystem, git, build, script, network, image, audio, db, etc.

milestones.title: Phase 2 — Web IDE Foundation
milestones.description: Monaco editor, file browser, AI agent chat, WebSocket streaming, setup automation

tasks.title: Monaco Editor integration (VS Code engine)
tasks.description: Full Monaco editor served from FastAPI with custom dark theme

tasks.title: File tree browser with expand/collapse
tasks.description: Lazy-loads directory contents on expand

tasks.title: AI agent chat panel with WebSocket streaming
tasks.description: Real-time agent output streamed via /ws/run WebSocket

tasks.title: File read/write API endpoints
tasks.description: GET /files, GET /files/read, POST /files/write with path-traversal protection

tasks.title: swissagent ui CLI command
tasks.description: Launches server + auto-opens browser

tasks.title: scripts/install.sh one-liner bootstrap
tasks.description: bash scripts/install.sh --launch sets up everything and opens IDE

milestones.title: Phase 3 — Build & Test Integration
milestones.description: Real-time build streaming, auto-detect build system, terminal, problems panel

tasks.title: /ws/terminal WebSocket subprocess streaming
tasks.description: Streams stdout+stderr of any shell command in real-time

tasks.title: /build/detect auto-detect build system
tasks.description: Detects cmake/npm/cargo/python/make from project marker files

tasks.title: Build/Test tabbed output panel in IDE
tasks.description: Separate Build tab showing live build output with ANSI color

tasks.title: Fix with AI button on build failure
tasks.description: Extracts errors and sends to agent with file context

tasks.title: Auto-rebuild on save toggle
tasks.description: Checkbox in toolbar; triggers build after each file save

tasks.title: Problems panel: list errors/warnings with file+line links
tasks.description: Parse build output for error patterns; click to jump to line

tasks.title: Real interactive terminal tab (full PTY)
tasks.description: xterm.js + PTY backend for a real shell session in the IDE

milestones.title: Phase 4 — Project Import & Management
milestones.description: Import local folders, git clone, project switcher

tasks.title: import_project agent tool
tasks.description: Copies any local folder into workspace/ with overwrite support

tasks.title: scan_folder agent tool
tasks.description: Lists folder contents + detects project type before importing

tasks.title: Import Project dialog in IDE GUI
tasks.description: 📥 button → dialog with path input, scan preview, import button

tasks.title: Git clone into workspace from URL
tasks.description: New clone dialog; uses git_clone tool; shows progress in terminal

tasks.title: Project switcher in sidebar
tasks.description: Dropdown to switch active project; updates build root and AI context

milestones.title: Phase 5 — Roadmap & Autonomous Self-Development
milestones.description: Living roadmap, autonomous task execution, progress tracking in IDE

tasks.title: workspace/roadmap.json living data file
tasks.description: 10-phase roadmap the AI reads, works through, and updates

tasks.title: Roadmap agent tools (list/next/start/complete/add)
tasks.description: 5 tools for the AI to interact with the roadmap autonomously

tasks.title: Roadmap API endpoints (GET /roadmap, PATCH /roadmap/task)
tasks.description: REST endpoints so GUI can display and update the roadmap

tasks.title: Roadmap panel in IDE with milestone/task view
tasks.description: Visual checklist with progress bars per milestone

tasks.title: Work on Next Task button with auto-advance option
tasks.description: Sends next roadmap task to agent; optionally loops through all

milestones.title: Phase 6 — Full VS Code-like Editor Suite
milestones.description: Activity bar, search, git panel, command palette, status bar, split editor

tasks.title: Activity bar with 5 panel modes
tasks.description: Icons: Explorer, Search, Git, Roadmap, Profile — switches left panel

tasks.title: Full-text search across all workspace files
tasks.description: GET /search?q= endpoint + search panel with results navigation

tasks.title: Git panel: status, diff viewer, stage/commit
tasks.description: Shows changed files, inline diff, commit message box

tasks.title: Command palette (Ctrl+P file / Ctrl+Shift+P commands)
tasks.description: Fuzzy-search files and commands; keyboard driven

tasks.title: Status bar: file info, git branch, AI status, error count
tasks.description: Persistent bottom bar showing contextual info

tasks.title: File context menu: rename, delete, copy path, new file/folder
tasks.description: Right-click on file tree item shows action menu

tasks.title: Split editor (two files side by side)
tasks.description: Drag tab to right half; Monaco handles split model

milestones.title: Phase 7 — AI Features Baked Into Editor
milestones.description: Inline completions, selection actions, diff review, code actions

tasks.title: Inline AI completions (Copilot-style)
tasks.description: Monaco InlineCompletionsProvider + /ai/complete endpoint; debounced

tasks.title: Floating selection toolbar: Explain/Refactor/Tests/Fix
tasks.description: Appears when text selected; sends selection to agent with context

tasks.title: Monaco right-click AI context menu actions
tasks.description: addAction for Explain, Refactor, Generate Docstring, Generate Tests

tasks.title: Diff viewer: agent proposes changes, user reviews before applying
tasks.description: Monaco DiffEditor shows old vs new; accept/reject buttons

tasks.title: AI explain error hover in Problems panel
tasks.description: Click error → AI explains it + suggests fix in chat

tasks.title: /ai/complete streaming endpoint for inline suggestions
tasks.description: Accepts file content + cursor offset; returns LLM completion

milestones.title: Phase 8 — Knowledge Base & Per-Project AI Profiles
milestones.description: Wiki aggregation, per-project AI personas, rule sets, RAG context injection

tasks.title: knowledge module: fetch_wiki, index_docs, search_knowledge
tasks.description: Fetch+chunk+store+search any URL; offline TF-IDF keyword search

tasks.title: project_profile module: AI persona, tech stack, LLM preference
tasks.description: .swissagent/profile.json per project; auto-detected from marker files

tasks.title: rules module: project rule sets (must/must_not/prefer)
tasks.description: .swissagent/rules.json; injected as constraints into every agent call

tasks.title: Inject active project profile + rules into agent system prompt
tasks.description: core/agent.py reads profile + rules from active project at startup

tasks.title: RAG: retrieve top-K relevant knowledge chunks per agent call
tasks.description: Before each LLM call, search knowledge base and prepend chunks

tasks.title: Knowledge panel in IDE: add/remove sources, search, status
tasks.description: List of doc URLs with fetch status; search box for knowledge base

tasks.title: Profile wizard: auto-detect tech stack, suggest knowledge packs
tasks.description: Scans project files and proposes profile + pre-built knowledge packs

tasks.title: Pre-built knowledge packs for major tech stacks
tasks.description: Python, JavaScript, C++, Rust, Go, React, FastAPI curated doc sets

milestones.title: Phase 9 — Plugin Ecosystem
milestones.description: Plugin browser, install from URL, hot-reload, template generator

tasks.title: Plugin browser panel in IDE
tasks.description: Lists installed plugins + install-from-URL input

tasks.title: Install plugin from GitHub URL
tasks.description: git clone into plugins/; auto-register without server restart

tasks.title: Hot-reload plugins without server restart
tasks.description: File watcher on plugins/; re-runs PluginLoader on change

tasks.title: Plugin template generator (AI-assisted)
tasks.description: Agent generates a new plugin skeleton from a description prompt

milestones.title: Phase 10 — Production Hardening
milestones.description: Auth, Docker, packaging, performance, persistence

tasks.title: Optional HTTP basic auth for API server
tasks.description: Configurable via config.toml; protects all endpoints

tasks.title: Docker + docker-compose setup
tasks.description: Dockerfile + compose with Ollama service; one command startup

tasks.title: Electron wrapper for standalone desktop app
tasks.description: Wraps the web IDE as a native desktop app with system tray

tasks.title: Streaming LLM responses (true token-by-token)
tasks.description: Ollama supports streaming; pipe tokens directly to WebSocket

tasks.title: Persistent chat history per project
tasks.description: Store conversation history in .swissagent/chat_history.json

tasks.title: Agent session memory across conversations
tasks.description: Use memory module to persist key facts between sessions

milestones.title: Phase 11 — Open-Source AI Stack
milestones.description: LocalAI Docker runtime, Docker Compose stack, model recommendations, sandboxed code execution

tasks.title: LocalAI LLM backend (llm/localai.py)
tasks.description: OpenAI-compatible local LLM via LocalAI at http://localhost:8080; reuses APILlm base

tasks.title: Add localai + openwebui to CLI --llm-backend choices
tasks.description: click.Choice in core/cli.py now includes openwebui and localai

tasks.title: [llm.localai] config section
tasks.description: configs/config.toml [llm.localai] with base_url, key, model

tasks.title: Dockerfile for SwissAgent
tasks.description: Multi-stage Python 3.11 image; exposes port 8000; mounts workspace volume

tasks.title: docker-compose.yml — SwissAgent + LocalAI + Open WebUI
tasks.description: One-command stack: swissagent (8000) + localai (8080) + open-webui (3000)

tasks.title: Docker sandbox for AI-generated code execution
tasks.description: Run pytest / build commands inside an isolated container; capture output; prevent host damage

tasks.title: Model download helper in IDE
tasks.description: One-click model download panel listing Codestral, DeepSeek R1, Phi-4, Qwen 2.5 Coder

milestones.title: Phase 12 — Self-Scaffolding Engine
milestones.description: Agent can generate new modules, plugins, tests, and roadmap tasks from a natural language description

tasks.title: scaffold_module tool: generate new module skeleton from description
tasks.description: Agent prompts LLM to produce tools.json + src/*.py for a new module; writes to modules/

tasks.title: scaffold_plugin tool: generate plugin from description
tasks.description: Produces plugins/<name>/plugin.py with register() and a README

tasks.title: scaffold_tests tool: generate pytest tests for any module
tasks.description: LLM inspects module source and produces tests/test_<module>.py

tasks.title: roadmap_add_task tool: agent can extend the roadmap
tasks.description: Append a new task (or whole milestone) to workspace/roadmap.json

tasks.title: Scaffold panel in IDE: describe → generate → review → apply
tasks.description: UI form that calls scaffold_module/plugin; shows diff before writing files

milestones.title: Phase 13 — Autonomous Self-Build
milestones.description: SwissAgent reads its own roadmap, implements the next task, runs tests in Docker sandbox, commits, and advances — fully autonomously

tasks.title: Self-build agent loop in dev_mode
tasks.description: roadmap_next → read source → LLM generates code → apply_patch → sandbox test → pass: commit+advance / fail: rollback+retry (max 3)

tasks.title: Docker sandbox executor for test isolation
tasks.description: Spin up a fresh container per task, run pytest, capture exit code + output, destroy container

tasks.title: Autonomous Self-Build button in Roadmap panel
tasks.description: Opt-in UI button that starts the self-build loop; live log stream; pause/stop controls

tasks.title: Self-build guardrails: blocked files, max retries, human-review gate
tasks.description: Prevent writes to core/permissions.py, configs/; require human approval for tasks tagged review_required

tasks.title: Git auto-commit with conventional commit messages
tasks.description: Each successful task produces: feat(module): <task title> — committed with co-author SwissAgent

tasks.title: Self-build telemetry: success rate, avg iterations, task history
tasks.description: Store per-task outcomes in .swissagent/self_build_log.json; display in IDE

milestones.title: Phase 14 — Code Quality & Developer Experience
milestones.description: Code formatting, linting, symbol search, workspace stats, diff apply, and code quality panel in IDE

tasks.title: Code formatter endpoint (POST /format)
tasks.description: Format Python/JS/JSON code using black/ruff if available; fallback to ast syntax check

tasks.title: Linter endpoint (POST /lint)
tasks.description: Run ruff/pylint/pyflakes on code and return structured diagnostics

tasks.title: Workspace statistics endpoint (GET /stats)
tasks.description: Count files, lines, language breakdown for the workspace

tasks.title: Symbol search endpoint (GET /search/symbol)
tasks.description: Regex-based search for function/class/variable definitions across the workspace

tasks.title: Unified diff apply endpoint (POST /diff/apply)
tasks.description: Apply a unified diff patch to a file in the workspace

tasks.title: Code quality panel in IDE
tasks.description: Panel in the IDE activity bar for running format/lint on current file and viewing diagnostics

tasks.title: POST /cron/job — create/update a job
tasks.description: Define a named job with schedule and command

tasks.title: GET /cron/jobs — list jobs
tasks.description: Return all registered cron jobs

tasks.title: DELETE /cron/job/{name} — remove a job
tasks.description: Delete a named job

tasks.title: POST /cron/job/{name}/run — trigger job now
tasks.description: Execute job command immediately and record result

tasks.title: GET /cron/job/{name}/history — per-job run history
tasks.description: Return run records for a specific job

tasks.title: GET /cron/history — global run history
tasks.description: Return all recent run records

tasks.title: /ws/cron — WebSocket live stream
tasks.description: Stream job run results to WebSocket clients

tasks.title: Cron Jobs panel in IDE
tasks.description: GUI panel with job definition, run/delete buttons, run history

milestones.title: Phase 33 — Audit Log
milestones.description: Record all significant API actions as structured audit entries, query by level or actor, and view stats

tasks.title: POST /audit/log — manual audit entry
tasks.description: Append a structured audit log entry

tasks.title: GET /audit/log — query log
tasks.description: Return recent entries filtered by level/actor

tasks.title: GET /audit/log/{id} — single entry
tasks.description: Fetch a specific audit entry by ID

tasks.title: GET /audit/stats — aggregate stats
tasks.description: Return counts by level, top actions, top actors

tasks.title: DELETE /audit/log/clear — purge log
tasks.description: Clear all audit log entries

tasks.title: Audit Log panel in IDE
tasks.description: GUI panel with stats overview, manual entry form, entries table with level colors

milestones.title: Phase 34 — Feature Flags
milestones.description: Define named feature flags with enabled/disabled state and optional variants; toggle and check flags via API

tasks.description: Define a named flag with enabled state and optional variant

tasks.title: GET /flags — list all flags
tasks.description: Return all registered feature flags

tasks.title: GET /flags/flag/{name} — get a flag
tasks.description: Fetch a specific flag by name

tasks.title: DELETE /flags/flag/{name} — delete a flag
tasks.description: Remove a named flag

tasks.title: POST /flags/flag/{name}/toggle — toggle a flag
tasks.description: Flip enabled state of a flag

tasks.title: GET /flags/check/{name} — check if flag is on
tasks.description: Return enabled state and variant for a flag

tasks.title: Feature Flags panel in IDE
tasks.description: GUI panel with flag form, flags table, toggle/delete buttons

milestones.title: Phase 35 — Config Profiles

tasks.description: Define a named profile with a key-value map

tasks.title: GET /config/profiles — list all profiles
tasks.description: Return all registered profiles and the active one

tasks.title: GET /config/profile/{name} — get a profile
tasks.description: Fetch a specific profile by name

tasks.title: DELETE /config/profile/{name} — delete a profile
tasks.description: Remove a named profile; clears active if it was active

tasks.title: POST /config/profile/{name}/activate — activate a profile
tasks.description: Set a profile as the active configuration

tasks.title: GET /config/active — get active profile values
tasks.description: Return the active profile name and its values

tasks.title: Config Profiles panel in IDE
tasks.description: GUI panel with profile form, profiles table, activate/delete buttons, active values display

tasks.description: Return all notifications with unread count

tasks.title: GET /notification/{id} — get a notification
tasks.description: Fetch a specific notification by ID

tasks.title: DELETE /notification/{id} — delete a notification
tasks.description: Remove a specific notification

tasks.title: POST /notifications/mark-read — mark all read
tasks.description: Mark all notifications as read

tasks.title: DELETE /notifications/clear — clear all
tasks.description: Remove all notifications and reset counter

tasks.title: Notification Center panel in IDE

tasks.description: Return tasks sorted by status then priority

tasks.title: GET /queue/task/{id} — get a task
tasks.description: Fetch a specific task by ID

tasks.title: DELETE /queue/task/{id} — delete a task

milestones.title: Phase 41 — Diff & Patch Tool

tasks.description: Return unified diff between two text blocks

tasks.title: POST /patch — apply patch to text
tasks.description: Apply a unified diff patch to a text string

tasks.title: POST /diff/files — diff two files
tasks.description: Compute unified diff between two files on disk

tasks.title: POST /patch/file — patch a file on disk
tasks.description: Apply a unified diff patch to a file, writing result back

tasks.title: Diff & Patch panel in IDE
tasks.description: GUI panel with Diff and Patch modes, text inputs, diff viewer

milestones.title: Phase 45 — API Client / HTTP Playground
milestones.description: Built-in Postman-like HTTP client for testing and exploring APIs

tasks.title: POST /apiclient/send — send HTTP request
tasks.description: Proxy any HTTP request (GET/POST/PUT/PATCH/DELETE/HEAD/OPTIONS) and return full response

tasks.title: GET /apiclient/collections — list collections
tasks.description: List all saved request collections
